name: Limited Service Agent
description: Time-bounded, task-specific delegation for a single service engagement. Fixed budget, narrow scope, automatic expiry. Suitable for one-off agent deployments.

principal_name.description: Full legal name of the delegating entity

principal_registration_number.description: Company registration or personal identification number

service_description.description: Specific service the agent is authorized to perform

budget_usd.description: Total fixed budget for the engagement in USD

end_date.description: ISO 8601 date when authority automatically expires

permitted_counterparties.description: Specific entities the agent may transact with (empty = any)
